member.summary: Creates and returns a clone of the object.

member.returns: An integer value indicating the order relationship.

member.name: P:LJCDataAccessConfig5.LJCConnectionTemplate.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the connection type name.

member.name: P:LJCDataAccessConfig5.LJCConnectionTemplate.Template
member.summary: Gets or sets the connection string template.

member.name: M:LJCDataAccessConfig5.LJCConnectionTemplates.Add(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Creates and adds the object from the provided valus.

member.name: M:LJCDataAccessConfig5.LJCDataConfig.ConnectionString(System.String)
member.summary: Creates the populated connection string from the ConnectionType name.

member.name: M:LJCDataAccessConfig5.LJCDataConfig.ConnectionStringFromTemplate(System.String)
member.summary: Creates the populated connection string from the template text.

member.name: P:LJCDataAccessConfig5.LJCDataConfig.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the DataConfig name.

member.summary: Gets or sets the Database name.

member.summary: Gets or sets the ConnectionType name.

member.summary: Gets or sets the UserID name.

member.name: P:LJCDataAccessConfig5.LJCDataConfig.Pswd
member.summary: Gets or sets the Pswd name.

member.summary: Represents a collection of LJCDataConfig objects.

member.summary: Gets a DataConfig from the DataConfigs.xml file.

member.summary: Creates and adds the object from the provided valus.
